response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit CTO-level leadership in fintech or regulated environments. His background in event-driven systems and open-source contributions is relevant, though his experience does not fully align with the executive responsibilities or depth in agentic AI production systems required for this role.
strengths: Diverse technical expertise across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems with hands-on experience in event-driven architectures.
Open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective) demonstrate initiative and familiarity with modular, scalable systems.
Experience with AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) and developer tooling, indicating exposure to agentic workflows.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or owning architectural governance).
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or real-time financial decisioning).
Agentic AI experience appears peripheral (e.g., tooling) rather than core production systems with financial stakes.
